name: Maple Sugar Filling & Frosting^
recipeInstructions:
1. Break maple sugar into small pieces and cover with enough water to thoroughly dissolve.
2. Boil the mixture until it becomes thick (waxes hard).
3. Turn off the heat and beat until nearly cold.
4. Add cream and butter, then return to the heat.
5. Cook until the desired consistency is reached.
6. Beat again until cool.
7. Add vanilla.
Many of the recipes in this collection did not contain amounts or oven temperatures. I have typed them in as they appear in the book, including typos.
